collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (2 total Queries, 2 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT tr.id, tr.date_operation, c1.telephone AS emetteur, c2.telephone AS destinataire, COALESCE(p.operateur, "Telma") AS operateur, COALESCE(p.est_operateur_propre, 1) AS est_operateur_propre, tr.montant, tr.frais, tr.frais_operateur, tr.frais_telma FROM transactions tr JOIN types_operations t ON t.id = tr.type_operation_id AND t.code = "transfert" JOIN clients c1 ON c1.id = tr.client_id JOIN clients c2 ON c2.id = tr.client_dest_id LEFT JOIN prefixes p ON substr(c2.telephone, 1, length(p.prefixe)) = p.prefixe ORDER BY tr.id DESC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT tr.id, tr.date_operation, c1.telephone AS emetteur, c2.telephone AS destinataire, COALESCE(p.operateur, "Telma") AS operateur, COALESCE(p.est_operateur_propre, 1) AS est_operateur_propre, tr.montant, tr.frais, tr.frais_operateur, tr.frais_telma FROM transactions tr JOIN types_operations t ON t.id = tr.type_operation_id AND t.code = "transfert" JOIN clients c1 ON c1.id = tr.client_id JOIN clients c2 ON c2.id = tr.client_dest_id LEFT JOIN prefixes p ON substr(c2.telephone, 1, length(p.prefixe)) = p.prefixe ORDER BY tr.id DESC
